description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MSVC build that runs on push to master branch and tags matching v*.*.*, and on pull requests to master. The workflow should trigger only when files in src, .github, tests, and tools directories change, excluding README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, and docs. Configure two windows-2019 jobs, x64 and x86, to check out code, set up MSVC development environment, cache libraries, set up libraries, configure CMake with Debug build type, and build using CMake.
